title: Nutty Crunchy Light Japanese Sesame Seeds Stir-fry
description: A light and crispy dish featuring white sauerkraut, poached in a savory sauce with nutty and crunchy sesame seeds for a vegan-friendly meal.

ingredients.name: Soy Sauce
ingredients.notes: Light soy sauce or tamari for a vegan alternative

instructions: Heat oil in a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Add garlic and white pepper, stir for about 30 seconds until fragrant.
Stir in sesame seeds and cook for an additional minute, stirring occasionally to prevent burning.
Pour in sauerkraut and soy sauce. Stir well to combine all ingredients.
Gradually add water, stirring continuously to prevent sticking. Bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover the pan with a lid and let simmer for about 10 minutes or until most of the liquid is absorbed and sauerkraut is tender but still holds its shape.
Turn off heat, remove from the pan and serve hot.
